description: An S-Corporation needs its annual income tax return prepared.

nodes.task_description: Input the S-Corp's income, deductions, and shareholder information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly enters all financial and ownership data.

nodes.task_description: Calculate officer compensation and ensure it is reasonable.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies that the salary paid to the owner is appropriate.

nodes.task_description: Prepare Schedule K-1 for each shareholder, allocating the business's profit and loss.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates accurate K-1s for all shareholders.
